prevalence.source: WHO Europe / European psychiatric epidemiology syntheses

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate to high with CBT access; varies by member state

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Primary care and mental health services use stepped-care pathways in many systems
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Exposure-based CBT and SSRIs; functional rehabilitation support where needed
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Wait times for CBT in some systems
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Broad psychotherapy availability in many member states
